characters.name: Zen Master Zhao
characters.description: An enigmatic Zen master who teaches through paradox, koans, and sudden silent gestures.
characters.dialogue_style: Enigmatic zen riddles (Koans) and sharp, paradoxical remarks
history_log: Performed The Invincible Adamantine Shield during Unknown hour. Score: 5/10.

characters.name: Alchemist Hermes
characters.description: A master of hermetic arts and chemical transmutations, carrying the caduceus.
characters.dialogue_style: Esoteric, verbose analogies about base metals, sulfur, and salt
history_log: Performed The Invincible Adamantine Shield during Unknown hour. Score: 5/10.

characters.name: Bodhisattva Chenrezig
characters.description: The multi-armed Lord of Universal Compassion, radiating white light of empathy.
characters.dialogue_style: Serene, highly compassionate, speaking of ultimate liberation and selflessness
history_log: Performed The Invincible Adamantine Shield during Unknown hour. Score: 5/10.

characters.name: King Suchandra
characters.description: The first Dharma King of Shambhala who requested and received the Kalachakra teachings.
characters.dialogue_style: Regal, righteous, commanding yet spiritually wise and precise
history_log: Performed The Invincible Adamantine Shield during Unknown hour. Score: 5/10.
